results.name: Namespace Consistency Check
results.evidence: Aligned namespace verified. McpApplication correctly configured as the application class in AndroidManifest.xml

results.name: Application Class Presence in DEX
results.evidence: Declared Application class (com.inscopelabs.abxmcp.McpApplication) is physically present in base DEX bytecode.

results.name: Keep-Rule Coverage and Signature Integrity
results.evidence: All boot guard classes are protected and retained in DEX with 100% keep-rule coverage. All boot guard classes are present in DEX.

results.name: MultiDex Configuration Check
results.evidence: minSdk is 24, which natively supports MultiDex (API level >= 21). No legacy legacy-multidex required.

results.name: Bundle Split and First-Launch Integrity
results.evidence: Requires manual review of dynamic features. First-launch startup classes and resources are located in the base module split.

results.name: Release and Debug Parity Check
results.evidence: Requires manual differential comparison of release and debug build symbols/mapping configurations.
